arabic: وَعَنْ عُقْبَةَ بْنِ صُهْبَانَ، قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ الْمُغَفَّلِ الْمُزَنِيِّ، فِي الْبَوْلِ فِي الْمُغْتَسَلِ‏.‏

english.text: "The Prophet (ﷺ) also forbade urinating at the place where one takes a bath."

chapter.english: Prophetic Commentary on the Qur'an (Tafseer of the Prophet (pbuh))
